n: Chapter 13.4: The Road to the Moon-lands

steps.t: Fennas Gost, the Dread Door on the outskirts of Gorgoroth, provides access to Imlad Morgul.
An injured Ranger at Fennas Gost has called to you, hoping to prevent you from suffering as he has.
Echad Uial is west of Fennas Gost, in Imlad Morgul.
Beregond is at Echad Uial in Imlad Morgul.
Beregond asked you to defeat foes throughout Rath Dúath, and to scout the terrain by <rgb=#00FF00>look</rgb>ing at several important landm…
Faramir, Prince of Ithilien, can be found near the Bridge of Gúliant in Imlad Morgul.
